channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Indian Among 3 Killed In Ukrainian Drone Attack On Moscow

media:content.media:description: A wave of almost 600 Ukrainian drones attacked Russia overnight.

item.description: Embassy officials have visited the site of the attack and met the injured workers in the hospital, the statement added.
item.content:encoded: Embassy officials have visited the site of the attack and met the injured workers in the hospital, the statement added.

item.title: 10 New Suspected Victims Come Forward In France's Epstein Probe

media:content.media:description: Investigators were also scouring through the so-called Epstein files.

item.description: France opened a human trafficking investigation after the US Justice Department in January released the latest cache of files from the investigation into the disgraced financier.
item.content:encoded: France opened a human trafficking investigation after the US Justice Department in January released the latest cache of files from the investigation into the disgraced financier.

item.title: UAE Nuclear Power Plant Hit By Drone, Triggers Massive Fire

media:content.media:description: Emirati officials did not attribute blame for the attack on the nuclear power plant.

item.description: The drone hit an electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, the Abu Dhabi Media Office said.
item.content:encoded: The drone hit an electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, the Abu Dhabi Media Office said.

item.title: No Actual Concessions In US Response To Iran's Proposal To End War: Report

media:content.media:description: In its proposal, Iran had called for an end of the war on all fronts.

item.description: The report added that the US had conditioned the cessation of hostilities on all fronts on the start of negotiations.
item.content:encoded: The report added that the US had conditioned the cessation of hostilities on all fronts on the start of negotiations.

item.title: Robot Monks Take Part In Lantern Parade Ahead Of Buddha's Birthday In South Korea

media:content.media:description: The robots have been given the role of honorary monks for this year's celebrations.

item.description: During the parade, visitors gathered along the streets for nearly 40 minutes as the robot monks moved through the city under colourful lanterns.
item.content:encoded: During the parade, visitors gathered along the streets for nearly 40 minutes as the robot monks moved through the city under colourful lanterns.

item.title: Trump's Advisers Warn China Could Attack Taiwan Within 5 Years: Report

media:content.media:description: During the summit, China formally described Taiwan as "the most important issue in China-US relations".

item.description: Despite the warm atmosphere that surrounded the Trump-Xi summit, those close to the US president are said to be deeply uneasy about Beijing's intentions.
item.content:encoded: Despite the warm atmosphere that surrounded the Trump-Xi summit, those close to the US president are said to be deeply uneasy about Beijing's intentions.

item.title: "Shoot Him In Neck Like Charlie Kirk": Chants At UK's Pro-Palestine Rally

media:content.media:description: Several protestors described themselves as both anti-genocide and anti-fascist.

item.description: Protestors at the pro-Palestinian march carried signs that read "smash the far right" and "Free Palestinian Hostages".
item.content:encoded: Protestors at the pro-Palestinian march carried signs that read "smash the far right" and "Free Palestinian Hostages".

item.title: Iran-Backed Terrorist Plotted Trump Assassination Through New Proxy Group

media:content.media:description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi was identified as a senior official in terror group Kata'ib Hizballah

item.description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi worked with a new Iranian-backed terrorist group that allegedly emerged "overnight" after the United States and Israel attacked Iran.
item.content:encoded: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi worked with a new Iranian-backed terrorist group that allegedly emerged "overnight" after the United States and Israel attacked Iran.

item.title: Uranium Transfer, Nuclear Limits: US Sets 5 Conditions In Ongoing Iran Talks

media:content.media:description: Trump recently rejected Iran's 14-point peace proposal.

item.description: The US has also reportedly demanded that Iran hand over 400 kilograms of enriched uranium to America as part of the negotiations.
item.content:encoded: The US has also reportedly demanded that Iran hand over 400 kilograms of enriched uranium to America as part of the negotiations.

item.title: New Taliban Law Says 'Silence Of Virgin Girl' Counts As Consent For Marriage

media:content.media:description: The decree authorises Taliban judges to intervene in disputes involving allegations of adultery

item.description: The 31-article decree, titled “Principles of Separation Between Spouses", was approved by Taliban supreme leader Hibatullah Akhundzada.
item.content:encoded: The 31-article decree, titled “Principles of Separation Between Spouses", was approved by Taliban supreme leader Hibatullah Akhundzada.

item.title: 97-Year-Old US Man Fulfils Childhood Dream Of Flying In Zero Gravity, Sets World Record

media:content.media:description: At the age of 97, Robert became the oldest man to fly in zero gravity.

item.description: During the short flight, he experienced the thrill of floating weightlessly, something he had dreamed about since childhood.
item.content:encoded: During the short flight, he experienced the thrill of floating weightlessly, something he had dreamed about since childhood.

item.title: NP Narvekar, Behind Harvard's $57 Billion Endowment Fund, Plans To Retire

media:content.media:description: Narvekar graduated from Haverford College and later earned an MBA from the Wharton School.

item.description: Narvekar also serves as a trustee at The Chapin School and is part of the investment committee at Haverford College.
item.content:encoded: Narvekar also serves as a trustee at The Chapin School and is part of the investment committee at Haverford College.

item.title: PM Modi Sweden Visit LIVE: PM Modi To Visit Sweden Today On Third Leg Of Five-Nation Tour
item.description: PM Modi in Netherlands LIVE Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a five-nation tour from May 15 to 20, during which he visited the United Arab Emirates as part of the first leg of the visit.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi in Netherlands LIVE Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a five-nation tour from May 15 to 20, during which he visited the United Arab Emirates as part of the first leg of the visit.

item.title: ICE Deported Woman Without 2-Year-Old Son, Then Blamed Her After He Was Killed

media:content.media:description: Orlin Josue Hernandez Reyes, who was living with his uncle, was found murdered

item.description: According to officials, the child suffered multiple broken ribs, a transected pancreas, burns on his body, and signs of possible sexual abuse
item.content:encoded: According to officials, the child suffered multiple broken ribs, a transected pancreas, burns on his body, and signs of possible sexual abuse

item.title: Georgia University Student Jumps Off Popular Cliff To Celebrate Graduation, Dies

media:content.media:description: Authorities said the lake drops at least another 70 feet below that ledge (File)

item.description: Jayden Barreto was celebrating graduation with friends at the lake, a spot the website describes as a “must-do jump for adrenaline junkies and thrill seek
item.content:encoded: Jayden Barreto was celebrating graduation with friends at the lake, a spot the website describes as a “must-do jump for adrenaline junkies and thrill seek

item.title: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Tehran Prepares "Mechanism" For Hormuz Traffic, Israel Strikes Lebanon

media:content.media:description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates

item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: FBI Jet, $35,000 Suite Date, Pearl Harbour Snorkel: Kash Patel Faces Heat

media:content.media:description: Kash Patel's girlfriend Alexis Wilkins is provided full-time security detail.

item.description: Several travels and related arrangements made on Kash Patel's orders included his girlfriend Alexis Wilkins, including a closed-door meeting on drug trafficking in Pennsylvania last month.
item.content:encoded: Several travels and related arrangements made on Kash Patel's orders included his girlfriend Alexis Wilkins, including a closed-door meeting on drug trafficking in Pennsylvania last month.

item.title: Nepal's Kami Rita Climbs Mount Everest For 32nd Time, Breaking His Own Record

media:content.media:description: Kami Rita had climbed Mt. Everest for the first time in 1994 (File)

item.description: The 56-year-old veteran climber reached the 8,849-metre peak at 10:12 am on Sunday, according to the Department of Tourism.
item.content:encoded: The 56-year-old veteran climber reached the 8,849-metre peak at 10:12 am on Sunday, according to the Department of Tourism.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Beijing Spectacle And The Recalibration Of Global Power
item.description: For the world's middle powers, including India, the solidification of Washington and Beijing's duopoly presents an acute, existential dilemma.
item.content:encoded: For the world's middle powers, including India, the solidification of Washington and Beijing's duopoly presents an acute, existential dilemma.

item.title: Reality Show Survivor Greece Stops Filming After Contestant Loses 'Part Of Leg' In Boat Accident

media:content.media:description: He remains hospitalised in serious but stable condition.

item.description: The contestant sustained severe injuries to his legs from the vessel's outboard engine propellers.
item.content:encoded: The contestant sustained severe injuries to his legs from the vessel's outboard engine propellers.
